title: selago michelliae
intro: Selago michelliae, also known as Blue Mountain Pride of the Mountain, is a flowering plant species native to South Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Selago michelliae include its ability to reduce fever and alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized in various forms.
